DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT ARG CONSERVATION SERVICES' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FIRST SET DISCOVERY REQUESTS [SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES TO H. MUELLER, REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS TO I. MUELLER TO H. MUELLER; FORM INTERROGATORIES TO I. MUELLER AND TO H. MUELLER] IS GRANTED. THE MOTIONS SEEKS RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION. THE 'RESPONSE' OF I. MUELLER AND H. MUELLER DOES NOT OPPOSE THE MOTION ON THE MERITS. RATHER, THE 'RESPONSE' RECITES THAT VARIOUS OF THE DISCOVERY DEMANDS HAVE BEEN RESPONDED TO, AND THAT THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO HAVE VERIFIED RESPONSES SERVED ON OR BEFORE MAY 14, 2010. IN CONFLICT WITH THE MOTION'S REQUEST, THE 'RESPONSE' SUGGESTS THAT VARIOUS OBJECTIONS MAY INDEED BE MADE. UNDER THESE CIRCUMSTANCES, THE MOTION IS GRANTED AND RESPONSES ARE DUE NOT LATER THAN MAY 14, 2010; HOWEVER, THIS ORDER SHALL NOT DIRECT RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO THE EXTENT THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED THAT OBJECTIONS MAY BE MADE. ORDER WAS SIGNED. JUDGE: CURTIS KARNOW. NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Jul-09-2010 Off Calendar

To Compel Plaintiffs' Responses To Arcg'S First Set Of Discovery Requests; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Apr-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Devin C. Courteau, Esq., appearing for defendant and moving party Arg Conservation Services

Dennis Michael Sullivan, Esq., appearing for plaintiff John G. Dooling

Defendant Arg Conservation Services' Motion to Compel Responses to First Set Discovery Requests [Special Interrogatories to H. Mueller, Request for Production of Documents to I. Mueller to H. Mueller; Form Interrogatories to I. Mueller and to H. Mueller] is granted. The motions seeks responses without objection. The 'Response' of I. Mueller and H. Mueller does not oppose the motion on the merits. Rather, the 'Response' recites that various of the discovery demands have been responded to, and that the parties have agreed to have verified responses served on or before May 14, 2010. In conflict with the motion's request, the 'Response' suggests that various objections may indeed be made. Under these circumstances, the motion is granted and responses are due not later than May 14, 2010; however, this order shall not direct responses without objection, to the extent the parties have agreed that objections may be made. Order was signed. Judge: Curtis Karnow. Not Reported.
